'''lashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:grandiosely|grandiosely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:grandiosely|grandiosely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lashate|lashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lashatesher|lashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashatesherĂ«m|lashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lashatero|lashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lashateshĂ«|lashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashateshĂ«m|lashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilashatero|gokilashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilashateshĂ«|gokilashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashateshĂ«m|gokilashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golashankerom|golashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golashankeshĂ«|golashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golashankeshĂ«m|golashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golashankeya|golashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lashaterom|lashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashatemu|lashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lashateya|lashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilashaterom|gokilashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashatemu|gokilashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilashateya|gokilashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lashashate|lashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lashashatesher|lashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashashatesherĂ«m|lashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lashashatero|lashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lashashateshĂ«|lashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashashateshĂ«m|lashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilashashatero|gokilashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilashashateshĂ«|gokilashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashashateshĂ«m|gokilashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golashashankerom|golashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golashashankeshĂ«|golashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golashashankeshĂ«m|golashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golashashankeya|golashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lashashaterom|lashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashashatemu|lashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lashashateya|lashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilashashaterom|gokilashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashashatemu|gokilashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilashashateya|gokilashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠshĂŠte|lĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠshĂŠtesher|lĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠshĂŠtero|lĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠshĂŠtero|gokilĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠshĂŠnkerom|golĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠshĂŠnkeya|golĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠshĂŠterom|lĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠshĂŠtemu|lĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠshĂŠteya|lĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠshĂŠterom|gokilĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠshĂŠteya|gokilĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafshafte|lafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafshaftesher|lafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafshaftesherĂ«m|lafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafshaftero|lafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafshafteshĂ«|lafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafshafteshĂ«m|lafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafshaftero|gokilafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafshafteshĂ«|gokilafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafshafteshĂ«m|gokilafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafshafnkerom|golafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafshafnkeshĂ«|golafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafshafnkeshĂ«m|golafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafshafnkeya|golafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafshafterom|lafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafshaftemu|lafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafshafteya|lafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafshafterom|gokilafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafshaftemu|gokilafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafshafteya|gokilafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
